prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约1299名、1255名、3018名、2140名、1735名。2023年出现异常波动后，2024–2025年持续回升，2025年基准位次约1735名，近两年累计回升约1283名，回暖趋势明显；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021年17人、2022年19人、2023年20人、2024年21人、2025年23人，呈逐年小幅扩招态势；2026年计划增至28人（较2025年扩招约21.7%），扩招幅度较大，将导致竞争有所缓解，位次数字趋于后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京师范大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第19名（Top20），近年排名稳定在19名左右，学校层次极高，对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应类事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度为较热（总排名第37位），短视频平台有一定曝光；2022年曾在江西省出现投档线异常（低关注），但天津地区未见明显断档记录，整体报考心理平稳；第五轮学科评估中，A+学科包括中国史、中国语言文学、地理学、心理学、教育学、马克思主义理论；A学科包括体育学、外国语言文学、数学、环境科学与工程、生态学、统计学；A-学科包括化学、哲学、法学、物理学、理论经济学、系统科学，A-及以上共18个学科，学科实力顶尖，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年天津考生总数约82000人（较2025年71938人增长约14%），考生规模明显扩大，整体竞争加剧；北京师范大学位于北京，与天津相邻，地域优势明显，对天津考生吸引力较强；该校在天津招生计划持续增加，本地招生占比相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1735名、2026年扩招约21.7%（计划从23人增至28人）导致位次后移、天津考生总数增长约14%加剧竞争、学校层次极高且声誉平稳等因素，以供需弹性为主值计算得1961名，在此基础上未做额外修正。预测2026年最低录取位次约1961名，区间1737–2185名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 汉语言文学（北京校区）
- 法学（卓越实验班；北京校区）
- 金融学（北京校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学与应用数学（北京校区）
- 心理学（含心理学、心理学<励耘实验班>；北京校区）
- 物理学类（物理学、天文学；北京校区）
- 人工智能（北京校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、环境科学、环境生态工程；北京校区）
- 地理科学类（自然地理与资源环境、人文地理与城乡规划、地理信息科学、资源环境科学；北京校区）
- 生物科学类（生物技术、生态学、生物科学；北京校区）
- 化学（北京校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在1961名附近，区间1737–2185名。位次在区间下限（1737名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（汉语言文学、法学卓越班、金融学）；位次在区间中段的考生建议以二档专业为主（数学、心理学、物理学、人工智能），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（2185名）附近的考生建议以三档专业保底为主，争取二档。北师大在天津分两个专业组招生（不限选科组和物化必选组），不限组位次通常更高，物化组相对友好，报考时需注意选科要求。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin Comprehensive category were approximately 1299, 1255, 3018, 2140, and 1735 respectively. After an abnormal fluctuation in 2023, rankings continued to recover in 2024–2025, with a baseline ranking of about 1735 in 2025, cumulatively recovering by about 1283 places over the past two years, showing a clear warming trend; the university's enrollment plan for Tianjin Comprehensive category was 17 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 23 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan increases to 28 (an expansion of about 21.7% compared to 2025), a relatively large expansion, which will ease competition and shift rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 19th (Top 20), with stable rankings around 19th in recent years, indicating a very high university level, maintaining strong appeal to candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management response incidents, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 37th), with some exposure on short video platforms; in 2022, there was an abnormal admission score line in Jiangxi Province (low attention), but no obvious gaps were recorded in Tianjin, with overall stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, A+ disciplines include Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Geography, Psychology, Education, and Marxist Theory; A disciplines include Sports Science, Foreign Language and Literature, Mathematics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Ecology, and Statistics; A- disciplines include Chemistry, Philosophy, Law, Physics, Theoretical Economics, and Systems Science, with a total of 18 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating top-tier academic strength, providing sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates in Tianjin is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% compared to 71,938 in 2025), with a significant expansion in candidate scale, intensifying overall competition; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, adjacent to Tianjin, with obvious regional advantages, strongly attracting Tianjin candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin continues to increase, with a relatively stable local enrollment proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1735, the 2026 expansion of about 21.7% (plan from 23 to 28) causing ranking to shift backward, the 14% increase in Tianjin candidate total intensifying competition, the very high university level and stable reputation, etc., using supply-demand elasticity as the main value, the calculation yields 1961, with no additional corrections. The predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is about 1961, with a range of 1737–2185.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Beijing Campus)
- Law (Excellent Experimental Class; Beijing Campus)
- Finance (Beijing Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Beijing Campus)
- Psychology (including Psychology, Psychology <Liyun Experimental Class>; Beijing Campus)
- Physics (Physics, Astronomy; Beijing Campus)
- Artificial Intelligence (Beijing Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, Environmental Ecology Engineering; Beijing Campus)
- Geographical Sciences (Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, Geographic Information Science, Resource and Environmental Science; Beijing Campus)
- Biological Sciences (Biotechnology, Ecology, Biological Sciences; Beijing Campus)
- Chemistry (Beijing Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 1961, with a range of 1737–2185. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (1737) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law Excellent Experimental Class, Finance); candidates in the middle of the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Psychology, Physics, Artificial Intelligence), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit (2185) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while aiming for Tier 2. BNU has two major groups in Tianjin (unrestricted subject group and physics-chemistry mandatory group), with the unrestricted group typically having higher rankings, and the physics-chemistry group being relatively friendly; candidates should pay attention to subject selection requirements when applying.
